title: antirrhinum litorale
intro: Antirrhinum litorale, also known as sea snapdragon, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Antirrhinum litorale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
